ddls:
CREATE TABLE "font_families" (
  "font_family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each font family */,
  "font_family_name" TEXT /* Name of the font family */,
  "symbolic_name" TEXT /* Symbolic name of the font family */,
  "font_family_type" TEXT /* Type of the font family (e.g., serif, sans-serif) */,
  "font_family_style" TEXT /* Style of the font family (e.g., modern, traditional) */,
  "font_family_vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the font family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("font_family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "font_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each font variant */,
  "font_family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the font family the variant belongs to */,
  "variant_type" TEXT /* Type of the font variant (e.g., normal, bold, italic, bold italic) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* File name of the font variant */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the font variant file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the font variant file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_font_variants_font_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("font_family_id") REFERENCES font_families ("font_family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., in_progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, designer, developer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "font_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project using the font */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the font variant being used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the font was used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., download, project use) */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the font was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_font_usage_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES font_variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_font_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "font_licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "font_family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the font family the license is for */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of the license (e.g., commercial, personal) */,
  "license_key" TEXT /* License key or identifier */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the license */,
  "license_terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_font_licenses_font_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("font_family_id") REFERENCES font_families ("font_family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "font_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each font version */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the font variant the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the font */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog or notes for the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_font_versions_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES font_variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "project_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the project */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the user left the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage statistic */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the font variant */,
  "total_downloads" INTEGER /* Total number of times the font variant has been downloaded */,
  "total_projects_used" INTEGER /* Total number of projects the font variant has been used in */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* Date when the font variant was last used */,
  "average_usage_per_project" REAL /* Average number of times the font variant is used per project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_statistics_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES font_variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "font_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the font variant the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag or keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_font_tags_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES font_variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "font_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the font variant the category belongs to */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_font_categories_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES font_variants ("variant_id")
)
